engines.bassoonDesc: E tšehetsa feela .xm / .mod. E khutlela ho Chiptune3 ebe FFmpeg bakeng sa liforomo tse ling.
engines.chiptune3Desc: E tšehetsa mefuta e fetang 20 ea tracker (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). E khutlela ho FFmpeg bakeng sa mefuta e meng.
engines.ffmpegDesc: E fetola mefuta eohle ea molumo ho MP3. E tšehetsa mefuta e mengata, empa e qala butle.

intro.tutorialStep3Title: 3. Pono o Phela — Pono ea Mokhoa le Li-Oscilloscope
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Theha akhaonto ea mahala ho bula likarolo tse ling:
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player e phela 'mino ka ho phela ka lipono tse peli tse tlatsanang tsa nako ea sebele:
intro.tutorialTitle: Mokhoa oa ho Sebelisa Tracker Player
intro.tutorialClosing: U thabele ho mamela — le ho natefeloa ke 'mino!
intro.introWelcome: Mokhoa oa ho thabela 'mino oa tracker ka mefuta e 68+ — ho tloha ho MOD le XM tse tummeng ho isa ho MPTM le UMX tsa morao-rao — o tsoa pokellong e kholo ho
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player e ka etswa ka tsela tse ngata. Fumana li-setting ka icon ea gear (bar e ka holimo) kapa Settings ear (sidebar e ka letsohong le letšehali):
intro.tutorialLead: Tataiso ena e u tsamaisa likarolong tsohle tsa Tracker Player, ho tloha ho fumana pina ea hau ea pele ho isa ho iketsetsa sebapali ho latela mokhoa oa hau oa tšebetso.
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Lenaneo la lipina ke pelo ea Tracker Player. Sebelisa bara ea ho batla e ka holimo ho fumana lipina ka lebitso la faele kapa sehlooho. Ka tlas'a bara ea ho batla, u tla fumana sehlopha se matla sa lihlopha:
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Malebe a: Ha u le mobile, eketsa Tracker Player skrineng sa hao ho ba le boiphihlelo bo tšoanang le app. E sebetsa hantle joaloka Progressive Web App e nang le polokelo ea offline.
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Tobetsa pina efe kapa efe lethathamong la lipina ho qala ho bapala. Sebapali se qala hang-hang — lifaele tse ngata li qala ho bapala ka nako e ka tlaase ho motsotsoana. Ha pina e ntse e bapala, u tla bona:
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player e fetohile haholo ho tloha tšimolohong ea eona e le sebapali se bonolo sa MOD/XM. Lena ke lethathamo la liketsahalo tsa bohlokoa:
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , e-browser-based Amiga MOD/XM tracker e ngotswa ka JavaScript feela ke Steffest, e tsosolosa boiphihlelo ba tracker playback ba khale ka botšepehi. Ho ipapisitsoe le motheo ona, morero o ile oa kenya Chiptune3 (enjene ea WebAssembly e ikhethileng e thehiloeng ho libopenmpt) le FFmpeg server-side transcoding butle-butle, ho atolosa tšehetso ea liforomo ho tloha ho MOD/XM ea pele ho feta liforomo tse 68.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Sebapali sa Tracker ha se feela sebapali — ke sethala sa 'mino oa tracker se nang le likarolo tse felletseng, se nang le sebopeho se setle se arabelang, pono ea paterone ea nako ea nnete, li-oscilloscope tsa kanale ka 'ngoe, le lisebelisoa tse etselitsoeng ho etsa hore ho sibolla le ho natefeloa ke 'mino oa tracker ho be bonolo sesebelisoa sefe kapa sefe.
intro.introWhatBody3: Ho tlholeho ea lipina le ho sefa, pono ea molumo, litsamaiso tsa liakhaonto tsa basebelisi ho isa ho tšehetso ea machaba, Tracker Player e hahile tsamaiso e feletseng ea likarolo tse potolohang ho potoloha mokokotlo oa sebapali, ka sepheo sa ho lumella basebelisi ho thabela botle bo ikhethang ba 'mino oa tracker ntle le semelo sa botekgeniki.
intro.introWhatBody1: Sebapali sa Tracker ke projeke ea botho e bulehileng e ikemiselitseng ho tlisa botle ba 'mino oa tracker ho sebatli sa kajeno. Ha se enjene e ncha ea molumo, empa ke kopanyo e tebileng le nts'etsopele ea bobeli e hahiloeng holim'a merero e metle e bulehileng e seng e ntse e le teng, e theha sistimi e felletseng ea boiphihlelo ba mosebelisi.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Pina e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe ho Tracker Player e na le URL e sa feleng, e ka arolelanoang. Kopola sehokelo ho tsoa bareng ea aterese ea sebatli sa hau ha pina e ntse e bapala — e tla shebahala joalo ka /song/123456/filename.mod. E romelle metsoalle, e behile mecheng ea litaba tsa sechaba, kapa e tšoaee bakeng sa morao. Sehokelo se tla lula se bula pina e tšoanang.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Ho tloha kajeno, 'mino oa tracker o ntse o atleha ka har'a sechaba sa demoscene lefatšeng ka bophara le har'a batho ba ratang likhomphutha tsa khale. Tracker Player e tšepa ho tsebisa batho ba bangata ka mokhoa ona o ikhethang oa bonono o jereng nalane ea 'mino oa khomphutha, ka sebopeho sa sejoale-joale le tšebelisano e bonolo.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: API ea litšoantšo ea sebatli e hlahisang pono ea paterone ea tracker ea nako ea sebele. Lintlha tsa paterone li romelloa ho WebGL canvas ka 60 fps, li hlahisa ponahalo ea lintlha tse tsamaeang tsa li-tracker tsa khale tse kang ProTracker le FastTracker II.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: LLVM-based compiler toolchain e fetolela khoutu ea C/C++ ho WebAssembly. Re sebelisa Emscripten ho kopanya libopenmpt ea rona e patiloeng — ho kenyeletsoa le waveform_processor e ikhethileng — hore e be module ea WASM ea faele e le 'ngoe e sebetsang ka lebelo le haufi le la tlhaho ka har'a AudioWorklet ea sebatli.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Meta-foromo ea Vue.js e matlafatsang frontend le backend ea rona kaofela. Nuxt e fana ka rendering ea lehlakoreng la seva bakeng sa ho jarisa maqephe ka potlako le SEO, seva ea Nitro bakeng sa litsela tsa API, kopanyo ea database ea SQLite, le ho arola khoutu ka boiketsetso bakeng sa ts'ebetso e nepahetseng.
intro.introTrackerBody1: 'Mmino wa tracker (eo e tsejoang hape e le 'mino oa module kapa 'mino oa MOD) ke mofuta o ikhethang oa 'mino oa dijithale o hlahileng bofelong ba lilemo tsa bo-1980 ho Commodore Amiga. Ho fapana le li-MP3 kapa 'mino o phallelang, lifaele tsa tracker li na le lintlha tsa 'mino (lintlha, lipaterone, litlamorao) le lisampole tsa liletsa — joalo ka faele ea projeke ea 'mino e ikemetseng. Sena se etsa hore lifaele tsa tracker li be nyane haholo ha li ntse li lumella ho rarahana ho makatsang ha 'mino.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Mokgwa o tsoelang pele oa JavaScript o sebelisoang bakeng sa UI ea rona e thehiloeng ho likarolo. Vue's Composition API, sistimi ea ho arabela, le likarolo tsa faele e le 'ngoe li entse hore ho khonehe ho aha le ho boloka sebopeho sa sebapali se rarahaneng ka khoutu e hloekileng, e arohaneng.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player e hahilwe ka mahetla a tsamaiso e babatsehang ea mohloli o bulehileng. Polokelo ea rona eohle ea lipina tse 135,400+ e tsoa ho The Mod Archive — polokelo e tiileng ea 'maraka ea 'mino oa tracker inthaneteng. Re leboha ka botebo moqapi e mong le e mong eo mosebetsi oa hae o entseng hore morero ona o khonehe.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: E entsoea ke Steffest. E le phethahatso e tšepahalang e thehiloeng ho sebatli ea li-tracker tsa khale tsa Amiga MOD le XM — ProTracker le FastTracker II — e ngotsoeng ka botlalo ka JavaScript. BassoonTracker e fana ka phetiso e tšepahalang, e futhumetseng e qalileng morero ona, ka tšehetso e felletseng ea li-MOD tsa 4-channel le li-XM tsa multi-channel tse kenyelletsang li-envelopes, li-filters, le li-effects.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Marang a phahlameng a marang-rang a 'mino o lateloang, o bolokang li-module tse fetang 150,000 tse tsoang ho baetsi ba likete ho pholletsa le lilemo tse mashome a mane. Mod Archive ke mohloli o le mong feela oa 'mino o ka har'a laeborari ea rona le setsi se ke keng sa nkeloa sebaka bakeng sa sechaba sa ho latela.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Mokgwa oa CSS oa pele oa thuso o sebelisetsoang ho etsa setaele. Sistimi ea matšoao a moralo oa Tailwind e thusa moralo oa rona oa lihlooho tse 16 — 'mala o mong le o mong, moriti, le moeli o ikamahanya le sehlooho se sebetsang ka thepa e khethehileng ea CSS e hlahisoang ho tsoa tlhophisong ea rona ea Tailwind.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Tlhaloso ya W3C Web Audio API e e thusang go dira gore modumo o tsamaye ka lebelo le le kwa tlase, o se na dikgwetlho, mo mogaleng o o ikgethileng wa nako ya nnete. AudioWorklet ke moo enjene ya rona ya Chiptune3 e e tsamaisang libopenmpt WASM e e kopantsweng, e sa itshetlehe ka mogala wa UI o mogolo, e netefatsa gore papatso e tsamaya ka thelelo go sa kgathalesege gore interface e dira eng.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Fomethe e qaliloe ke Karsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker ka 1987, 'me e ile ea fetoha ka potlako ka har'a demoscene — setso se tlase se matla moo baetsi ba mananeo, libini, le baetsi ba litšoantšo ba qothisanang lehlokoa ho theha mesebetsi e hlollang ea molumo le pono. Lilemong tse mashome, mefuta e mengata ea li-tracker e ile ea hlaha, e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe e sutumetsa meeli ea se neng se ka khoneha: liteishene tse ngata, litlamorao tse betere, liletsa tse entsoeng ka synth, tšehetso ea li-plugin tsa VST, esita le bokhoni bo felletseng ba ho kopanya. Kajeno, lefapha la li-tracker le ntse le sebetsa lefatšeng ka bophara, 'me 'mino o mocha o lokolloa letsatsi le letsatsi libakeng tse kang The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: E entsoea ke DrSnuggles — laeborari ea JavaScript e bulehileng e koahelang libopenmpt ka har'a AudioWorklet bakeng sa ho bapala liforomo tse fetang 68 tsa tracker ka sebatli. Bakeng sa morero ona, re ile ra iketsetsa processor ea AudioWorklet ho ntša data ea leqhubu la kanale ka 'ngoe (e matlafatsang li-oscilloscope tsa likanale tse ngata), ra eketsa taolo ea kenyelletso e iketsang, 'me ra matlafatsa ho sebetsana le maemo a ho potlakela bakeng sa ho fetola lipina ka potlako. Chiptune3 e sebetsa e le borokho pakeng tsa Web Audio API ea sebatli le matla a ho hlalosa a kaho ea rona e patiloeng ea libopenmpt, 'me ke enjene ea rona e khothalletsoang ka ho fetisisa.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: E entsoeletsoe ke bafani ba OpenMPT. Laeborari e hlakileng ea phatlalatso ea tracker e bulehileng, e tšehetsang mefuta e fetang 68 ea liforomo ka ho nepahala ho sa bapisoeng. Re fetotse khoutu ea mohloli oa C ea libopenmpt — re eketsa waveform_processor e ikhethileng e tšoarang data ea PCM ka kanale ka har'a mixer pele ho tlhahiso ea ho qetela — 'me ra e kopanya ho WebAssembly ka Emscripten. Kaho ea rona ea WASM e patiloeng e nkela sebaka sa binary e kopantsoeng e tsoang holimo e kentsoeng le Chiptune3, e nolofalletsang li-oscilloscope tsa kanale ka 'ngoe le ho etsa mokokotlo oa ho hlalosa bakeng sa liforomo tsohle tse fetang 68.
tutorialStep1Filters: Sefete ea Fomete — Tobetsa ho bula keriti ea khetho e mengata ea lifomete tsohle tse teng. Sebelisa likonopo tse behiloeng esale pele ho khetha lihlopha ka potlako: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 Tsohle (mefomete e 56), kapa Tsohle Tse Tšehetsoeng.
Sefe ea Litsela — Fokotsa ka palo ea litsela: litsela tse 4 (mehla ea khale ea MOD), litsela tse 8, kapa litsela tse 8+ (mehla ea sejoale-joale ea lipina tse ngata).
Sefete ea Boholo — Sefete ka boholo ba faele: e nyenyane (<100KB), e mahareng, kapa e kholo (>1MB).
Sefi ea lebitso la tracker — Ngola lebitso la tracker (mohlala, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") ho fumana 'mino o entsoeng ka software e itseng.
Likhetho tsa ho hlophisa — Hlophisa lethathamo la lipina ka ID, sehlooho, lebitso la faele, boholo, kapa letsatsi la phetoho, ka tatellano e nyolohang kapa e theohang.
Khetho ea Mohloli — Fetoha lipakeng tsa Lipina tsohle, tseo u li Ratang, le Nalane ea Hao ea ho bapala.
tutorialStep2Details: Lintlha tsa Pina — Sehlooho, sebini, sebopeho, palo ea liteishene, le nomoro ea pina tse bontšitsoeng ka holim'a litaolo tsa sebapali.

Phetha/Phehla & Tsamaiso — Konopo e kholo ea phetha/phehla e nang le mokhethoa oa mokhoa oa ho bapala: Shuffle (ka tšohanyetso), Ka Tatelano (ka tatellano), Phetha E 'Ngoe, kapa Ema Kamora Ea Hona Joale.
Pina e latelang — Tlolela pina e latelang ka letsoho, kapa e tlohele mokhoa oa ho bapala oo u o khethileng o e tsamaise.
Bophahla le Tsoelopele — Fetola bophahla ka selae, batla pina ka har'a pina, 'me u bone nako e fetileng/e setseng.
Konopo ea Like — Tobetsa pelo ho kenyelletsa pina ho tseo u li ratang (e hloka akhaonto).
Kopolla — Boloka faele ea tracker ea mantlha sesebelisoa sa hau.
Sehokelo sa ModArchive — Bula leqephe la pina ho The Mod Archive bakeng sa tlhaloso e eketsehileng le maikutlo a sechaba.

Fesane ea Tlaleho ea Pina — Sheba lintlha tse qaqileng tsa metadata: lebitso la tracker, letsatsi, nako, mofuta oa container, lipina tse ka hare, palo ea liteishene, liletsa, lisampole, litaelo, lipaterone, le molaetsa ofe kapa ofe o kentsoeng ke moqapi.
tutorialStep3Details: Pono ea Paterone — Bona data ea paterone ea tracker e ntse e tsamaea ka nako ea sebele, e hlahisitsoe ka WebGL bakeng sa ts'ebetso e boreleli. Kholomo e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe e emela kanale, mola o mong le o mong ke ketsahalo ea noto. Lintlha, liletsa, molumo, le litaelo tsa phello li bontšoa kaofela — joalo ka har'a mohlophisi oa tracker oa khale. Tobetsa toggle ea paterone ho chencha lipakeng tsa li-layout tse emeng (tse tloaelehileng) le tse rapameng (tse pharaletseng).

Li-ts'ebetso tsa Li-Oscilloscope tsa Kanale ka 'ngoe — Ka tlas'a sebapali, u tla bona keriti ea lipontšo tsa maqhubu — e 'ngoe bakeng sa kanale e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe ea molumo pina. Tsena li tsamaisoa ke processor ea rona ea maqhubu a boemo ba C e hahiloeng ka har'a libopenmpt, e ntšang molumo oa kanale ka 'ngoe pele ho motsoako oa ho qetela. Shebella maqhubu a kanale ka 'ngoe a ntse a phalla ka nako ea sebele, e u fa setšoantšo sa pono sa kamoo 'mino o hahiloeng kateng — moropa oa kick ho kanale 1, bass ho kanale 2, lead ho kanale 3, joalo-joalo.
Liphepelo tse peli li ka buloa kapa tsa koaloa ho Settings bakeng sa ts'ebetso kapa khetho.
tutorialStep4Settings: Sebopeho sa ho Bapala — Khetha pakeng tsa BassoonTracker (classic MOD/XM), Chiptune3 (e khothaletsoang, liforomo tse 20+), kapa FFmpeg (ts'ehetso e pharalletseng ea liforomo ka phetoho ea lehlakoreng la seva).

Thema — Khetha kumathemba emibala e-16. Mathemba a khanyang a kenyelletsa Light, Retro (Solarized), Ocean (Teal), Forest (Green), Strawberry (Pink), Blue, Pink, Cyan, Orange, le Gray. Mathemba a lefifi a kenyelletsa Dark, Midnight (Deep Purple), Golden (Black & Gold), Purple, Red, le Green.
Puo — Lipuo tse 52 tsa sebopeho. Khetho ea hau e bolokoa sebakeng sa heno.
Bopha — Behaola boemo ba bopha ka tlwaelo mme o bo qobelle pina e nngwe le e nngwe ha o batla.
Ho phahamisa molumo ho tloaelehileng — E fetola molumo oa ho bapala ka boiketsetso bakeng sa ho mamela ho tsitsitseng (e butsoe ka boiketsetso).
Palo ea Potoloha haholo — Lipina tsa Tracker hangata li potoloha ka ho sa feleng. Beha palo e phahameng ea potoloho ho thibela ho bapala ho sa feleng (ka tloaelo: 1).
Lipapatso tsa Pontšo — Bontša kapa pata pono ea sebaka, pono ea mohlala, le karolo ea kenyelletso.
tutorialStep5Details: Tsejo tse ratang — Atla pelo ho boloka pina efe kapa efe lethathamong la tsona, le fihlellehang ho tsoa ho khetho ea mohloli oa lethathamo la lipina.
Histori ea Phetetso — Pina e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe eo u e bapalang e tlalehoa ka bo eona. Tsamaisa histori ea hau ho fumana lipina hape.
Puisano ea Lisebelisoa tse Fapaneng — Lintho tseo u li ratang le nalane ea hau li u latela lisebelisoa tse fapaneng ha u kena.
Tšhupamano — Akhaonto ya hao e boloka feela tse ratoang le nalane. Ha ho boitsebiso ba botho bo bokelloang kapa bo arolelanoang.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Laeborari ea lifaele tsa 'mino tsa tracker tse 135,400+ tse akaretsang liforomo tse 68+, ho tloha ho li-MOD tsa 4-channel ho isa ho li-epics tsa 256-channel.
Mokgwa oa li-engine tse tharo: BassoonTracker (JS ea khale), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), le FFmpeg (phetolelo ea server) — e khethoa ka boiketsetso bakeng sa faele e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe.
Pono e sheba ea tracker ea nako ea sebele e hlahisitsoeng ka WebGL — shebella lintlha li thella joalo ka ha ho etsoa ho editor ea tracker ea khale.
Li-oscilloscope tsa maqhubu a kanale ka 'ngoe — bona tlhahiso ea molumo oa kanale ka 'ngoe e le leqhubu le phelang le tsamaeang, le tsamaisoang ke ho ntšoa ha maqhubu a boemo ba C.
Moralo o arabang o ikamahanyang hantle le skrine efe kapa efe: komporata, letlapa, kapa fono — ho kenyeletsa le mokhoa oa paterone e rapameng bakeng sa skrine e sephara.
16 mebala e metlotlohantsoe ka hloko — ho tloha ho leseli le hlakileng ho isa ho bosiu bo tebileng, retro ea solarized, khauta e futhumetseng, le tsohle tse lipakeng.
Lipuo tsa sebopeho tse 52 — ho etsa hore 'mino oa tracker o fihlellehe ho bamameli lefatšeng ka bophara.

Matla a matla a ho batla, sefapano sa ho khetha ka sebopeho se nang le likonopo tse behiloeng esale pele (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, Tsohle tse Tšehetsoeng), sefapano sa palo ea liteishene, le ho hlophisa ka likarolo tse ngata.
Sisteme ea akhaonte e nang le tse ratoang le nalane ea ho bapala — kopanya laeborari ea hau ho pholletsa le lisebelisoa tsohle tsa hau.
Lihokelo tsa lipina tse arolelanoang ka ho sa feleng — pina e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe e fumana URL e ikhethileng joalo ka /song/123456/filename.mod.
Kopitsa lifaele tsa tracker tsa mantlha kapa ho li fetolela ho MP3 ka ho tobetsa hanngoe feela.
Karataolo ea tlhahisoleseling e bonts'a metadata: sehlooho, sebini, tracker, sebopeho, liteishene, liletsa, disampole, litaelo, dipaterone, le molaetsa o kenelletseng.
E loketše, mohloli o bulehileng, 'me o tsamaisoa ke sechaba — ha ho lipapatso, ha ho phatlalatso, ha ho marako a tefo.

trackInfo.title: Sehlooho
trackInfo.noMeta: Ha ho na metadata e fumanehang bakeng sa pina ena.
